chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَفْسُقُ بِالْغُلَامِ فَيَتَزَوَّجُ ابْنَتَهُ أَوْ أُخْتَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 74 – The man is immoral with the boy, so he marries his daughter, or his sister

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/172)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/172)
text: رَجُلٍ يَأْتِي أَخَا امْرَأَتِهِ فَقَالَ إِذَا أَوْقَبَهُ فَقَدْ حَرُمَتْ عَلَيْهِ الْمَرْأَةُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who went to a brother of his wife. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he penetrated him, so the wife is Prohibited unto him’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of his people who have said the following: About the case of a man who goes to his brother-in-law, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, Tf he has made hole in him his wife becomes unlawful for him.’”
